document_info.document_type: Texas Department of Insurance Experience Rating Worksheet

coverages_discussed.notes: Experience rating worksheet for policy number WC-HCHP-2025-3350; final experience modification factor 0.94.

positives: Actual excess losses are 0 across all listed policy years.
concerns: Loss activity is shown in each of the three listed policy years.
Claim counts listed are 2 in 2023-2024, 6 in 2022-2023, and 8 in 2021-2022.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Loss data reflects 2 claims and 9940 incurred in 2023-2024, 6 claims and 26662 incurred in 2022-2023, and 8 claims and 56343 incurred in 2021-2022. Primary losses equal total incurred in each year, and excess losses are 0.
